message:
Merge PR #2160: fix(sling): worktree validation + convoy cleanup on rollback

Strengthen worktree validation to catch broken .git pointers by running
git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree instead of just checking file existence.
Adds tests for valid, missing, and broken worktree scenarios.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2160
Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
